top_signals.title: Industry warns Iran war spike to come as food inflation falls
top_signals.summary: The surprise drop in food and drink inflation seen in May is likely to be short-lived, as the impacts of the war in Iran are due to take hold, leading industry figures to warn. The rate of inflation of food and non-alcoholic drinks fell from three per cent in April to 2.2 per cent in [...]

top_signals.title: Starmer Hot Mic Moment Suggests Breakthrough in India Trade Row
top_signals.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer raised expectations that Britain has resolved a trade impasse with India, when he and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi were caught on a microphone at the G7 summit in France saying some form of agreement had been reached.
